texto: In our adventures, we have only seen our monsters more clearly and described his scales and fangs in new ways - ways that reveal a cancer cell to be. like Grendel, a distorted version of ourselves." -1989 Nobel Prize Speech, Cited in Siddhartha Mukherjee's Emperor of All Maladies
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Harold Varmus: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “In our adventures, we have only seen our monsters more clearly and described his scales and fangs…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, cancer, health pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e health.
